title: senna centranthera
intro: Senna centranthera, also known as the Cassia auriculata or senna auriculata, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to India and Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating constipation and indigestion due to its laxative effects. The health benefits of Senna centranthera include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. Senna centranthera can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote digestive health and overall well-being.
